base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fireball_enemies — a character from 1990 super mario world. Bullet Bills + Podoboos + Ball 'n' Chain hazards. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bullet Bills + Podoboos + Ball 'n' Chain hazards
